name: simplicio-loop
description: Autonomous looping orchestrator + 5 satellite skills (6 total) that drains a backlog end-to-end on any LLM/runtime: discover, implement, verify, review, merge, close. Hardened Ralph loop that exits only when a typed completion-promise is genuinely true, adversarial pre-merge review, token-economy clamp, and a hard cost kill-switch. Installs two project-scoped PreToolUse Bash hooks — a fail-closed safety-gate that blocks dangerous/irreversible commands and secret-leaking commits, and an opt-in output-clamp that rewrites only whitelisted read-only commands (fail-open) to cut tokens — plus a Stop loop/learn hook. Runs 100% locally with no telemetry and no network calls. Start a run with /simplicio-tasks. MIT.
